changelog:
v1.0.8 Changes:

• New: Monitor & FPS Cap Advisor — interactive decision tool with personalised recommendations for VRR, FPS cap, V-Sync, and monitor buying
• New: G-Sync Pulsar support with buying recommendations
• New: ELMB/strobing tip for high-refresh monitors when FPS can't keep up
• Fixed: V-Sync recommendation now context-sensitive (Off for 240Hz+, On for lower refresh)
• Fixed: Low Latency Mode recommendation (Off with Reflex, per-game profile caveat)
• Fixed: Multiple Monitors section split into Extended vs Cloned with EDID capture card tip
• Fixed: Merged Display + Monitor Advisor into single unified page
• Fixed: CTT debloat section — added 'click Run Tweaks' reminder
• Fixed: BasicGamingTweaks script now auto-applies and shows clear completion message
• Fixed: CPU benchmark reference recalibrated from real 9800X3D measurements
• Fixed: Memory benchmark references recalibrated (L3, Sequential, Random latency)
• Fixed: Optimisation Score fix links (Startup Programs, GPU P-State, HAGS, Driver Age)
• Fixed: Device Cleanup Tool download (wrong exe name)
• Fixed: Wizard scroll behaviour — no longer jumps to bottom of page
